since_last: 19% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 19% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.05% · BTC -2.71% · Gold -2.53% · Nasdaq100 -1.17%. 19% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.02%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.02%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.49%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.49%, BIDU +4.14%, AVGO +3.99%, ANET +3.88%, AMBA +1.13%. Laggards: PANW -6.04%, UPST -5.84%, INTC -5.14%, CRNC -4.78%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.13% at $149.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
